---
description: "Generate persuasive email copy for marketing campaigns"
name: "Email Campaign Copy"
argument-hint: "Specify audience, offer, and tone (e.g., 'fitness enthusiasts, 20% off membership, motivational')"
---

Generate a complete email campaign copy based on the following details:

- **Audience**: [Describe the target audience, e.g., demographics, interests, pain points]
- **Offer**: [What you're promoting, e.g., product, service, discount]
- **Tone**: [Desired tone, e.g., professional, casual, urgent, inspirational]

Provide the email in this structure:

### Subject Line
[Compelling subject line]

### Preheader Text
[Short preview text that appears in inbox]

### Email Body
[Opening hook paragraph]

[Main content explaining the offer and benefits]

[Social proof or urgency element]

[Call to Action button text and link]

### Footer
[Unsubscribe link, contact info, branding]

Include 2-3 variations for the subject line and CTA to choose from.
